fields.description:
## Actual Behavior
During merge-to-main.sh for worktree-20260417-103317, the tickets branch sync phase failed:
```
error: The following untracked working tree files would be overwritten by merge:
    250b-d21e/1776475611698087000-27185298-388c-4403-b0b8-d52147066a3b-SNAPSHOT.json
Aborting
```
Script aborted the fast-forward and skipped the tickets branch push. Main code push succeeded but tickets branch is out of sync with remote.

## Expected Behavior
merge-to-main.sh should handle untracked SNAPSHOT files in the tickets worktree gracefully — either by removing stale SNAPSHOTs before the sync, or by warning and continuing without aborting the entire tickets push.
fields.title: merge-to-main: untracked SNAPSHOT file in tickets worktree -> tickets branch sync aborted
